capabilityStatement.overview: Snowflake delivers the AI Data Cloud, enabling organizations to unite siloed data and run diverse workloads.
capabilityStatement.industries: Retail, Healthcare, Financial Services, Media, Technology
capabilityStatement.differentiators: Single platform for all data workloads with near-unlimited scalability and instant elasticity.
capabilityStatement.pastPerformance: Enabling 9,000+ organizations to mobilize data with the Snowflake Data Cloud.
capabilityStatement.certifications: SOC 2 Type II, ISO 27001, HIPAA, FedRAMP Moderate

capabilityStatement.overview: Splunk turns data into doing with a unified security and observability platform.
capabilityStatement.differentiators: Unified platform for both security and observability with powerful search and analysis.
capabilityStatement.pastPerformance: Trusted by over 15,000 organizations globally for mission-critical operations.
